'''Janqual Mor''' was the owner of the [[Coronet Mining Corporation]].

==Behind the scenes==
Mor is mentioned in a mission called "Gang War Threatens Mining Interests" in ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', available at Mission Terminals on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]].
